description: A recent configuration update has caused the Wazuh Manager service to fail. The service is currently in a crash loop or failed state. Troubleshoot and resolve the configuration errors within /var/ossec/etc/rules/local_rules.xml on the Wazuh Manager container (wazuh-wazuh.manager-1). Restore the wazuh-manager service and ensure that custom rules 100200 and 100201 are successfully loaded and active.
